schemas.name: Flexbox Playground & Generator
schemas.description: Interactive CSS Flexbox builder. Visually edit flex container and flex item properties, preview live layouts, and generate CSS code instantly.

mainEntity.name: How do I generate flexbox CSS code?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use our Flexbox Playground above: visually adjust container properties (flex-direction, justify-content, align-items, flex-wrap, gap) and item properties (flex-grow, flex-shrink, order). The CSS code updates in real-time — copy it directly into your project.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between justify-content and align-items?

acceptedAnswer.text: justify-content controls alignment along the main axis (horizontal in row direction, vertical in column). align-items controls alignment along the cross axis (perpendicular to main). For example, in a row layout: justify-content centers horizontally, align-items centers vertically.
